label: Transparent leaf sheep sea slug motif
prompt:
Use case: scientific-educational
Asset type: Morphous Leaf Sheep Sea Slug transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a leaf sheep sea slug motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A cute but biologically recognizable leaf sheep sea slug, Costasiella-like, with a white rounded sheep-like face, two black bead eyes, tiny dark rhinophores, many bright leaf-green cerata shaped like small succulent leaves along the back, subtle pale aqua reef highlights, soft cream underside, and gentle learning-system personality. It must read as a leaf sheep sea slug, not a sheep, caterpillar, plant, frog, or generic nudibranch.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show face, eyes, rhinophores, green leaf-like cerata, compact slug body, and tiny foot without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no reef background, no sand, no coral props, no extra animals, no text, no watermark, no random logo.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Leaf Sheep Sea Slug light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Leaf Sheep Sea Slug", derived from a cute leaf sheep sea slug motif with green leaf cerata, white face, black bead eyes, soft shallow reef aqua, and gentle cream. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, 3840x2160 target, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Leaf Sheep Sea Slug, Leaf Sheep Sea Slug, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from bright leaf-green cerata, translucent aqua leaf rims, white sheep-like face, black eye ink, soft shallow reef water, and gentle cream underside. The board must read as leaf sheep sea slug, cute learning system, not a generic green plant theme.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short, large, and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: cute learning dashboard system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, reef-cream surfaces, leaf-green primary actions, black eye-ink text and focus, soft aqua controls, celery-green success, dotted chloroplast textures, rounded but not childish component geometry, restrained shadows.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Leaf Sheep Sea Slug", no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no generic blue/purple gradients, no one-note green palette, no coral overload, no cartoon sheep mascot replacing the sea slug.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Leaf Sheep Sea Slug dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Leaf Sheep Sea Slug". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from a cute leaf sheep sea slug motif with green leaf cerata, white face, black bead eyes, soft shallow reef aqua, and gentle cream.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, 3840x2160 target, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Leaf Sheep Sea Slug, Leaf Sheep Sea Slug, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the same leaf sheep sea slug system language: bright leaf-green actions, dark kelp ink panels, white face text, black eye-ink accents, reef aqua controls, gentle cream highlights, dotted chloroplast texture, and shallow reef learning dashboard patterns.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short, large, and legible on dark reef surfaces.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep kelp-ink background, raised dark cards, white face foreground, leaf-green active states, aqua focus rings, celery success, cream warning surfaces, subtle reef-water texture, crisp 8px cards.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Leaf Sheep Sea Slug", no illegible tiny paragraphs, no generic blue/purple gradients, no one-note green palette, no neon aquarium colors, no pure-black-only flat background, no coral overload, no cartoon sheep mascot replacing the sea slug.
